name: Lord Rolfe
description:
(this takes place in the throne of glass/sarah J Mass book/ universe after Kingdom of Ash)

Story: four years after the last battle against Mauve and Erawan for good, the world has shifted greatly as the once diveded realms are now working together with Queen Aelin of Terrasen and King Dorian of Adarlan leading the charge with thier courts of trusted friends and oaths to each other as friends and family

Rolfe now Lord of Ilium, King of the Archipelago and leader of the Mycenians and a part of Terrasens court he spends a lot of his days managing his city, his people, and keeping Aelin updated on the comings and goings of the coast enforcing the no slavery ban on every shore.
creator: Alice Savage
